title: platanthera ciliaris var. blephariglottis
intro: Platanthera ciliaris var. blephariglottis, also known as the yellow-fringed orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Platanthera ciliaris var. blephariglottis include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a useful remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots in water or oil, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
